notes: SHIP v1.14.334 - FIX 'stuck on Loading 3D…' (owner device-confirmed the INSPECT-3D hero rack was not loading). ROOT CAUSE (two stranding points in the .330 lazy-load path, never device-verified until now): (1) cmd_rackHero3D's loadScript('./vendor/three.min.js').then() guard was `if (_rdMode!=='command' || !document.body.contains(mount) || mount.offsetParent===null) return;` - if the hero mount wasn't the laid-out visible surface at the instant three.js (603KB) finished downloading, it returned and left the 'Loading 3D…' text forever, with nothing to re-trigger it (self-heals only on a later Command re-render). (2) even when paint() was reached, rackElevation_render3D's internal 0x0-not-laid-out retry re-arms ONLY for the reh3d PANEL host (checks #reh3dCanvasHost.is-3d), never the hero - so a 0x0 hero mount aborted silently. three.min.js itself is fine (precached sw.js:49, 603445 bytes present); the render engine is fine (direct rackElevation_render3D call renders a canvas on .333). FIX: rewrote paint() to be retry-aware and non-stranding - abort ONLY if genuinely gone (_rdMode!=='command' OR mount detached); if still on Command but the mount isn't laid out yet (offsetParent null / 0x0), requestAnimationFrame-retry on the HERO itself, bounded to ~120 frames (~2s); last resort = cmd_rackHeroFlat (FLAT elevation) so the rack can NEVER stay stuck on the loading text. The .then no longer carries the strand-guard - paint() owns the still-relevant + laid-out checks. Off-Command loads still correctly no-op (abort) and recover on the next Command render via cmd_render. Scope: ONE function (cmd_rackHero3D), redesign-only (hero path); no change to rackElevation_render3D internals, the panel path, materials/geometry (.333 untouched), or the Master pipeline. Gates: inline-JS vm.Script compile x3, sw.js ok, version.json valid, CSS brace net-0, three-stamp .333->.334 lockstep; phantom-ship-gate + phantom-rd-reviewer pre-commit. DEVICE-VERIFY (installed PWA, HARD-REFRESH / clear SW first - a stale SW is the other way this looks broken): load a Master -> the INSPECT-3D hero rack renders (no permanent 'Loading 3D…'); if WebGL/three ever can't come up you get the FLAT elevation instead of a stuck spinner; leave+return to Command still re-mounts. ROLLBACK: revert this commit (restores the strand-prone guard). NOTE: SPEC-COMMAND-V2-FINAL.md (Command v2) is the next ship and rebuilds this hero (D4 removes the .332 control strip, D6 resizes) - this .334 fix keeps the current hero working until V2 lands.
